queries.question: From what private donors did Contractor B get the project funding and how much was it? Also, show the project.
queries.sql:
SELECT Funding.privateDonors, Funding.fundsAmount
FROM Funding
JOIN Payments on Funding.projectID = Payments.projectID
JOIN Contractors on Payments.contractorID = Contractors.contractorID
WHERE Contractors.companyName = "Contractor B"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?privatedonors ?fundsamount WHERE {
  ?funding a :Funding .
  ?payments a :Payments .
  ?funding p:hasProjects ?shared_projects .
  ?payments p:hasProjects ?shared_projects .
  ?contractors a :Contractors .
  ?payments p:hasContractors ?contractors .
  ?funding p:privateDonors ?privatedonors .
  ?funding p:fundsAmount ?fundsamount .
  ?contractors p:name ?companyname_f .
  FILTER(?companyname_f = "Contractor B")
}

queries.question: List the government agency and private donor who submitted a payment on February 5th 2022.
queries.sql:
SELECT Funding.governmentAgency, Funding.privateDonors
FROM Funding
JOIN Payments on Funding.projectID = Payments.projectID
WHERE Payments.paymentDate = "2022-02-05"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?governmentagency ?privatedonors WHERE {
  ?funding a :Funding .
  ?payments a :Payments .
  ?funding p:hasProjects ?shared_projects .
  ?payments p:hasProjects ?shared_projects .
  ?funding p:governmentAgency ?governmentagency .
  ?funding p:privateDonors ?privatedonors .
  ?payments p:paymentDate ?paymentdate_f .
  FILTER(?paymentdate_f = "2022-02-05")
}

SELECT Funding.governmentAgency,Funding.privateDonors, Funding.fundsAmount
FROM Funding
JOIN Payments on Funding.projectID = Payments.projectID
JOIN Contractors on Payments.contractorID = Contractors.contractorID

queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?governmentagency ?privatedonors ?fundsamount WHERE {
  ?funding a :Funding .
  ?payments a :Payments .
  ?funding p:hasProjects ?shared_projects .
  ?payments p:hasProjects ?shared_projects .
  ?contractors a :Contractors .
  ?payments p:hasContractors ?contractors .
  ?funding p:governmentAgency ?governmentagency .

}

ambiguous_dsl.question: For what project and how much funding did Contractor B get and from where?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?privatedonors ?fundsamount WHERE {
  ?funding a :Funding .
  ?payments a :Payments .
  ?funding p:hasProjects ?shared_projects .
  ?payments p:hasProjects ?shared_projects .
  ?contractors a :Contractors .
  ?payments p:hasContractors ?contractors .
  ?funding p:privateDonors ?privatedonors .
  ?funding p:fundsAmount ?fundsamount .
  ?contractors p:name ?companyname_f .
  FILTER(?companyname_f = "Contractor B")
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?governmentagency ?fundsamount WHERE {
  ?funding a :Funding .
  ?payments a :Payments .
  ?funding p:hasProjects ?shared_projects .
  ?payments p:hasProjects ?shared_projects .
  ?contractors a :Contractors .
  ?payments p:hasContractors ?contractors .
  ?funding p:governmentAgency ?governmentagency .
  ?funding p:fundsAmount ?fundsamount .
  ?contractors p:name ?companyname_f .
  FILTER(?companyname_f = "Contractor B")
} }
  full: { SELECT ?governmentagency ?privatedonors ?fundsamount WHERE {
  ?funding a :Funding .
  ?payments a :Payments .
  ?funding p:hasProjects ?shared_projects .
  ?payments p:hasProjects ?shared_projects .
  ?contractors a :Contractors .
  ?payments p:hasContractors ?contractors .
  ?funding p:governmentAgency ?governmentagency .
  ?funding p:privateDonors ?privatedonors .
  ?funding p:fundsAmount ?fundsamount .
  ?contractors p:name ?companyname_f .
  FILTER(?companyname_f = "Contractor B")
} }
}
